CustomField.formula: OR(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSBCCDCDairyPlantLicence' , RecordType.DeveloperName = 'ConstructionPermitApplication', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'DairyWorkerLicence', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Evaluation', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSExemptions', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'OperatingPermitApplication' )
CustomField.label: Is Belongs to PHOCS?
